eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Otter Tail, MN; at 1:07 PM on JUN 20, 2019 Effective until 2:07 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test of the Emergency Alert System from the Otter Tail County Sheriff's Office. This is only a test.
